subcodes.first_line: O Rustam! Tyranny hath encompassed the world, and ignorance and heedlessness, like the dark night, have enveloped both East and West [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای رستم ستم جهانرا فروگرفته نادانی و بیهوشی چون شب تاریک باختر و خاور را
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration
